# Real Heading

This is real content.

```markdown
# Fake Heading Inside Code

This should NOT be detected as a heading.

## Another Fake Heading

More fake content.
```

## Second Real Heading

Content after the code block.

```python
# This is a Python comment, not a heading
def hello():
    print("world")
```

## Third Real Heading

Final content.

```
### Yet another fake heading
```

End of document.
